screenshot_description: Standard admin list page showing corridor data table with columns: 序号, 廊道ID, 廊道代码, 廊道网段数, 廊道业务域, 创建时间, 操作. Includes top search filters, left sidebar navigation, and bottom pagination.
changes: Completely rewrote 廊道信息维护.html from a complex map-based corridor drawing tool into a standard list/table admin page matching the reference screenshot. Reused the collapsible sidebar pattern from 起降点信息维护.html. Added corridor domain color tags (city/suburb/rural). Columns: 序号, 廊道ID, 廊道名称, 廊道网段数, 廊道业务域, 创建时间, 操作(详情/编辑/删除). Search filters: 廊道ID, 廊道名称, 廊道所在空域. Pagination, batch delete, CRUD form view all functional.
user_instruction_style: Chinese, concise: 参照图片把廊道信息维护页面改成和图片一样，左侧导航栏复用起降点信息维护页面的导航栏
user_preferences_learned: Prefers standard list-table admin layout over map-based views for maintenance pages
Reuses sidebar/nav patterns from other completed pages for consistency
Follows 起降点信息维护.html as the reference design pattern for all maintenance list pages
